case_title: LACIE THOMPSON MARKETING, LLC VS. ICERINGS, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66143758) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACIE THOMPSON MARKETING, LLC SERVED NOV-04-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ICERINGS, INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON DEC-07-2020 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LACIE THOMPSON MARKETING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ICERINGS, INC. $47,611.33 PRINCIPAL, $985.95 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $49,047.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100163065) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LACIE THOMPSON MARKETING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ICERINGS, INC.
